title: Edmund Moshammer
text: Home * People * Edmund Moshammer Edmund Moshammer [1] Edmund Moshammer , an Austrian economist currently at the European Stability Mechanism , holding a M.Sc. degree in specialized economic analysis from Barcelona Graduate School of Economics , Barcelona , Catalonia , Spain from 2014. As avocational chess programmer Edmund Moshammer has been involved in the development of the CPW-Engine and Glass Chess Engine , working with Pawel Koziol [2] . A side project was the creation of the Glass opening book format and the corresponding tool, the Glass Opening Book Manager [3] . In March 2014, Edmund Moshammer introduced a port of UCI to JavaScript dubbed JSUCI [4] [5] .
